app.title: VALORANDOMIZER
app.subtitle: Set your role composition and summon five agents at random. Built for custom games, five-stacks, stream challenges, and quick team drafts.

landing.title: Make VALORANT customs start with a better team draft.
landing.description: Valorandomizer combines role-based random squads with past pro composition drafts. Use it for five-stacks, custom lobbies, stream challenges, and quick rulesets when your lobby needs a spark.
landing.howOneBody: Set how many Duelists, Initiators, Controllers, and Sentinels you want, then generate a realistic five-agent squad.
landing.howTwoBody: Keep agents you like and reroll only the slots you want to change, so your lobby can adjust around comfort picks.
landing.howThreeBody: Random Pick and Pro Pick have dedicated URLs. Share role counts, maps, teams, and filters directly to Discord or X.
landing.useCaseTitle: A VALORANT composition generator for five-stacks, customs, and stream challenges
landing.useCaseBody: Use normal random squads or draft past pro team setups. Try pro-composition-only customs, map-filtered VCT drafts, or Team A vs Team B challenges across regions.

mode.randomDescription: Build a squad from your selected role composition and reroll individual agents as needed.
mode.proDescription: Draw from past pro team picks and use the result as a custom-game challenge.

result.heading: Your Squad
result.empty: Set your role composition and hit Summon.

proPick.heading: Pro Pick Draft
proPick.subtitle: Draw past pro team setups for custom games. Share map, event, region, and team filters directly in the URL.

legalNotice.heading: Unofficial fan project
legalNotice.body: Valorandomizer was created under Riot Games' "Legal Jibber Jabber" policy using assets owned by Riot Games. Riot Games does not endorse or sponsor this project.

legalPage.title: Legal and IP Notice
legalPage.intro: Valorandomizer is a free fan project for the VALORANT community. It is not an official Riot Games service and is not endorsed, sponsored, or affiliated with Riot Games.
legalPage.fanBody: Valorandomizer was created under Riot Games' "Legal Jibber Jabber" policy using assets owned by Riot Games. Riot Games does not endorse or sponsor this project.
legalPage.ipBody: VALORANT, agent names, agent artwork, and related game assets belong to Riot Games or their respective owners. This site does not claim ownership over those assets and does not use official logos or trademarks to imply endorsement.
legalPage.dataBody: Pro Pick match and composition data is reference data compiled from publicly available information. Source links may point to external sites, but Valorandomizer is not affiliated with those sites.
legalPage.privacyBody: In the current feature set, Pro Pick Match Records are stored in your browser's localStorage. No account signup or personal information input is required. If analytics, ads, or login features are added later, this page should be updated.
legalPage.accuracyBody: Agent compositions, pro setups, events, and maps are provided for convenience and are not guaranteed to be accurate. Patch changes, roster moves, and map pool changes may make the data differ from the live game environment.
legalPage.officialNotice: This project is not endorsed, sponsored, or affiliated with Riot Games.
legalPage.contact: Rights holders can request corrections or removals through the GitHub repository or the site operator.
